name: live-analysis-platform
description: 直播内容分析平台 - 基于GitHub Pages的静态网站

scripts.dev: npm run scan && npm run start
scripts.dev:decrypt: npm run decrypt && npm run scan && npm run start
scripts.dev:encrypted: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.build: npm run scan && npm run encrypt
scripts.vouchers:help:
echo "凭证加密系统命令帮助:
  npm run vouchers:setup  - 初始化凭证文件夹结构
  npm run vouchers:encrypt - 加密所有凭证图片
  npm run vouchers:status  - 查看加密状态
  npm run vouchers:help    - 显示此帮助信息

详细文档请查看: VOUCHER_SYSTEM_GUIDE.md"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && git add . && git commit -m 'Update analysis data and encrypt files' && git push
